name: DeepWiki Repo Explainer
description: Explains the architecture of any GitHub repository as a DeepWiki-style page with a generated infographic.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' blob: data: https://image.pollinations.ai; connect-src 'self' https://mcp.deepwiki.com https://text.pollinations.ai https://image.pollinations.ai
